audit_items.proof_trace: The single throw-site at line 295 does not explicitly free the live Sass_Import_Entry or the resources entry, but Context::~Context() (lines 117-136) is always invoked via sass_delete_compiler (sass_context.cpp:568) even on the exception path. The destructor frees resources[i].contents/srcmap, strings[n], and each import_stack entry via sass_import_take_source + sass_delete_import, with the take-source/take-srcmap calls nulling the import's pointers to prevent double-free against the resources loop. All allocations live at the throw site are thus fully reclaimed with no leak or double-free.
